Who We Are

Trusted Food
Traders in India and Abroad

Owned and operated by Lovesh Kumar, Bipral Enterprises is a government-registered micro and macro enterprise based in Rambagh, Purnia. We specialize in the retail and wholesale distribution of food products, ensuring quality supply chains for businesses and Household.

🤝
Reliable Supply
We maintain consistent stock of cereals, pulses, and food staples to meet both retail and bulk wholesale demands.
📍
Locally Rooted
Headquartered in Purnia, we understand the local market and serve our community with honest, transparent pricing.
✅
Government Certified
Fully compliant with GST regulations and registered under the Udyam MSME scheme for quality assurance.
What We Offer

Our Product Range

From farm-fresh cereals to essential daily staples, we supply quality food products for retail stores, restaurants, and wholesalers.

🌾
Cereals & Grains
Premium quality Fox Nut (Makhana), wheat, rice, maize and other staple grains sourced directly for the freshest supply.
Wholesale & Retail
🫘
Pulses & Legumes
Chana, moong, masoor, urad and more — bulk supply to retailers and direct-to-consumer options.
Wholesale
🧂
Food Staples
Essential daily food products including edible oils, spices and packaged goods for retail distribution.
Retail
🛒
Agricultural Raw Materials
Wholesale supply of agricultural raw materials and live animal feed for agro-based businesses.
Wholesale
📦
Bulk Orders
Custom bulk packaging and supply solutions for restaurants, canteens, and institutional buyers.
B2B
🚛
Distribution Network
Efficient delivery network covering Bihar and other states within India and Abroad.
Service
